visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man in the passenger seat of a car at night. He has dark hair and a sweaty face, looking distressed. Another man's hand, wearing a white glove, is visible, holding the passenger's chin and mouth, preventing him from speaking. The background outside the car window is dark and blurry, suggesting a nighttime setting. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed in white. The camera remains steady, capturing the tense interaction between the two men. A man speaks in a low, strained voice, filled with a sense of weary resignation and perhaps a hint of admiration. He says, "He's an undercover agent." The gloved hand is removed, and the passenger, still looking worried, turns his head slightly. The man in the driver's seat, also in focus, looks forward with a serious expression. The passenger continues to look around anxiously. The "风行网" text remains on screen. The camera angle is consistent, maintaining a tight focus on the two men's faces. He continues, "Wow, that policeman is a tough guy."
